content.query:
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD='expendable@1008'

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL cred_priya
WITH 
IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH(
    LOCATION ='https://awdatalakestorageaccount.blob.core.windows.net/silver',
    CREDENTIAL= cred_priya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH(
    LOCATION ='https://awdatalakestorageaccount.blob.core.windows.net/gold',
    CREDENTIAL= cred_priya
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE=PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION= 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_extsales
WITH(
    LOCATION ='extsales',
    DATA_SOURCE= source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT= format_parquet
)AS select * from gold.sales

select * from gold.sales
